title: NOT EXISTS filter doesn't seem to work with VALUES clause
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT, value INTEGER);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, name, value) VALUES (1, 'Barack_Obama', 10), (2, 'Angela_Merkel', 20);
CREATE TABLE foo_table (type TEXT NOT NULL);
SELECT name FROM test_table WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM foo_table WHERE type = 'foo') AND value > 5;
key_bug_features: NOT EXISTS filter fails with multiple VALUES clause entries
